Agents.Name: SentimentAgent
Agents.Description: Analyzes tweets and returns JSON sentiment + confidence.

OutputVariable.Name: SentimentJson
OutputVariable.Description: JSON string with sentiment, confidence, reasoning.

Agents.Name: MarketAgent
Agents.Description: Compares sentiment confidence to market YES price and decides.

Agents.Name: ExecutionAgent
Agents.Description: Simulates execution and prints a clean log line.
Agents.PromptTemplate:
You are a trading execution agent. Decision: {{decision}}. Edge: {{edge}}.
Produce ONE line execution log, e.g. "Simulated trade placed: ..." No JSON.
